title: carex pruinosa var. suifunensis
intro: Carex pruinosa var. suifunensis, a variant of the hairy sedge plant, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carex pruinosa var. suifunensis include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing its rhizomes, which can be made into teas, decoctions, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
